hero.headline: *Clean gutters* that actually stay clean
hero.subheadline: Myron shows up on time, cleans thoroughly, and fixes what's broken while he's up there.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every gutter, every detail
services_section.subheading: From cleaning to repairs — we handle what keeps water flowing away from your home

services.title: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Complete debris removal with downspout clearing and flow testing.

services.title: Gutter Repair
services.description: Seal leaks, secure loose sections, and replace damaged components.

services.title: Gutter Installation
services.description: New seamless gutters sized and positioned for your roofline.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Regular inspections and maintenance to prevent costly water damage.

about.heading: Myron and the LeafFree team
about.body: We're the Fredericksburg gutter crew that shows up when scheduled and fixes what needs fixing. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Jordan T.
reviews.text: Myron is great! Gutters are clear, and he sealed and secured everything while he was up there. Highly recommend for any gutter work.

reviews.name: Bill A.
reviews.text: Myron was on time and professional. Cleaned the gutters, caulked end caps and downspouts, plus took photos throughout. Very impressed.

reviews.name: Clarence J.
reviews.text: Myron did a great job and his experience really shows through his work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Fredericksburg and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local gutter services throughout the Northern Virginia region

cta.heading: Ready for gutters that actually work?
cta.body: Free estimate with photos and honest pricing. No surprises, no hidden fees.
